ContextOverflow.description: Strategy when LLM context exceeds max_context_tokens.

oneOf.description: Drop oldest non-system messages until under limit

JoinStrategy.description: Join strategy for parallel execution groups.

oneOf.description: Wait for all agents to complete
Advance when the first agent completes
Append to an array (creates array if not present)

NodeKind.description: Node kind in the pipeline graph.

oneOf.description: Pure routing node — evaluates routing without running an agent
Parallel fan-out node — routing function returns Fan(targets)

PipelineStage.description:
Pipeline stage with routing, fallbacks, and parallel config.

Routing evaluation order: 1. If agent failed AND error_next set → route to error_next 2. If routing_fn registered → call it, use result 3. If no routing_fn → fall through to default_next 4. If no default_next → terminate (COMPLETED)

agent.description: Agent name to dispatch (ignored for Gate nodes).

allowed_tools.description: Tool whitelist — only these tools are available to this stage's agent.

default_next.description: Fallback target when no routing function is set or it returns Terminate.

error_next.description: Target stage when the agent fails (checked before routing_fn).

has_llm.description: Whether this agent makes LLM calls (default: false — require explicit opt-in).

join_strategy.description: How to join parallel branches from a Fork (WaitAll or WaitFirst).

max_context_tokens.description: Maximum estimated tokens allowed in LLM context for this stage. Uses chars/4 heuristic. When exceeded, applies context_overflow strategy.

max_tokens.description: LLM max_tokens override for this stage.

max_tool_rounds.description: Maximum tool call rounds in the ReAct loop (default: 10).

max_visits.description: Per-stage visit limit. Terminates with `MaxStageVisitsExceeded` when reached.

model_role.description: Model role (e.g. "fast", "reasoning") — resolved by LLM provider.

name.description: Stage identifier (must be unique within the pipeline).

node_kind.description: Node kind: Agent (run agent + route), Gate (route only), Fork (parallel fan-out).

output_key.description: State field key for this stage's output (defaults to stage name).

output_schema.description: JSON Schema for validating agent output before writing to state.

prompt_key.description: Prompt template key for this agent. None = deterministic (no LLM call).

retry_policy.description: Retry policy for transient agent failures. Retries with backoff before falling through to error_next routing.

routing_fn.description: Name of a registered routing function. Called after agent completion (or directly for Gate nodes) to determine the next stage.

temperature.description: LLM temperature override for this stage.

timeout_seconds.description: Per-stage wall-clock timeout in seconds (K8s container timeout / Temporal startToClose). Agent execution is cancelled if it exceeds this deadline.

RetryPolicy.description:
Retry policy for transient agent failures (Temporal activity retry pattern).

When an agent fails with `success: false`, the worker retries with exponential backoff before routing to `error_next`. No retry on interrupt requests.

max_retries.description: Maximum retry attempts (0 = no retry, default).

StateField.description: Schema entry for a state field.

description:
Pipeline configuration for orchestration.

The kernel is a pure evaluator — it iterates routing rules, first match wins. All pipeline shape (linear, branching, cycles) is defined by the capability layer via routing rules on each stage.

edge_limits.description: Per-edge transition limits (e.g. max 3 trips from stage A→B).

max_agent_hops.description: Global agent hop bound (transitions between stages). Terminates with `MaxAgentHopsExceeded`.

max_iterations.description: Global iteration bound. Terminates with `MaxIterationsExceeded` when reached.

max_llm_calls.description: Global LLM call bound across all stages. Terminates with `MaxLlmCallsExceeded`.

name.description: Unique pipeline name (used for event attribution and child pipeline references).

publishes.description: Event types this pipeline publishes via CommBus.

stages.description: Ordered list of pipeline stages. First stage is the entry point.

state_schema.description: Typed state fields with merge strategies for loop-back accumulation.

step_limit.description: Maximum routing steps per `get_next_instruction` call (default: 100). Prevents infinite Gate/Fork chains from blocking the orchestration loop.

subscriptions.description: Event types this pipeline subscribes to via CommBus.

title: PipelineConfig
